metadata.sourceNotes: Low-confidence cleanup 2026-05-29: Exploring Greece directly supports Vathi Pigadi on Agathonisi, a dirt-road approach after Poros with a rough final dirt section, pebbles on the shore and sand in several seabed spots. sourceNotes: Popular regions source pass 2026-06-02: Ferryhopper and Exploring Greece both directly support Gaidouravlakos/Gadourolakkos on Agathonisi, with pebble beach material and access by boat or a harder foot route from Spilia. sourceNotes: Popular regions source pass 2026-06-02 B: Exploring Greece directly supports Spilia on Agathonisi, easy access from Agios Georgios port by the coastal road for about 500 m, sand and small pebbles, natural shade, shallow depth, unorganized status, and normal road accessibility. Coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.
